calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ruperto Austria in Propria Persona.

Mr. Austria stated that he did not know he had to obtain permission from the Court to make distributions. The Court informed Mr. Austria of his responsibility to seek authority prior to making any distributions. The Court granted the Petition to Terminate Estate and for Order for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chien. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Continued To Jan-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruperto Austria, in Propria Persona.

Mr. Austria reported that he has not done distribution yet, that he did not know that he needed to file a petition and confirmed that he has not gotten any help with this case. The status of filing a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a status report was continued to September 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear and the Order to Show Cause re Removal are off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Continued To Aug-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Continued To Aug-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 10:15 a.m. and there is no appearance by the administrator. An Order to Show Cause regarding removal will be issued to the administrator Ruperto Austria to appear on August 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has not complied with the June 1, 2016 order. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 9:45 a.m. and there is no appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the executor Ruperto Austria to appear on July 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed, with an order that the petition be on file by July 11, 2016 . The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
